response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, decades of hands-on development experience across languages and domains, and strong open-source contributions — especially in Linux and DLang — aligning with the role’s focus on open-source and digital sovereignty. However, he lacks explicit evidence of leadership in IT consulting, architectural design documentation (e.g., UML), team management at executive level, and crucially, German proficiency is only 'basic,' falling far short of the required C1.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with open-source technologies and Linux environments
Proven track record in founding and maintaining impactful open-source projects (GISCollective)
Deep technical craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and cross-platform system design
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML modeling, IT architecture documentation, or client advisory experience
Lack of demonstrated experience managing teams or leading projects in an IT consulting context
